blocks.text: Carlsen's World Chess title assault kicks off Wednesday
The Candidates Tournament crowns the next World Championship challenger. Carlsen enters Wednesday as favourite — this is his most direct path back to the throne.
♟️ Wed 16:00 — Carlsen opens FIDE Candidates 2026, Round 1 — must-watch
🚴 Wed 11:55 — Wærenskjold races Dwars door Vlaanderen — Belgian warm-up before Ronde
🎾 Sun 06:00 — Rolex Monte-Carlo Masters begins — clay season's first major
